title: Sharing Opinions
learningGoal: The learner will verbally construct sentences using plain form verbs, adjectives, and nouns connected to '~to omoimasu'.
instructions: In this roleplay, a friend asks for your opinion on various topics. Reply verbally in Japanese based on the English prompts. Pay attention to the grammatical class of the word before 'to'.

contentItems.text: Remember: Nouns need 'da'. i-Adjectives do not. Verbs must be in the plain form (Dictionary or Nai form).

speakingPrompt: Translate: 1) I think it is expensive. 2) I think Tanaka will not go. 3) I think it is a lie.
scenario: A conversation between friends sharing gossip and opinions.

subTasks.prompt: Give your opinion on the price. Say: 'I think it is expensive.'

sampleResponse.targetText: たかいと おもいます。

subTasks.prompt: Give your prediction about Tanaka. Say: 'I think Tanaka will not go.'

sampleResponse.targetText: たなかさんは いかないと おもいます。
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: I think Tanaka will not go.

subTasks.prompt: Express disbelief. Say: 'I think it is a lie.'

sampleResponse.targetText: うそだと おもいます。
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: I think it is a lie.

scenarioContext.targetText: どう おもいますか。

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: たかいと おもいます。
たなかさんは いかないと おもいます。
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: I think Tanaka will not go.

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: うそだと おもいます。
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: I think it is a lie.

expectedSpeakingPoints: Say Tanaka-san wa ikanai to omoimasu
acceptableParaphrases: Dropping 'Tanaka-san wa' is acceptable if the context is understood, but full sentence is preferred.

criteria.name: i-Adjective Rule
criteria.description: Did the learner say 'Takai to' instead of 'Takai da to'?

criteria.name: Nai-form Rule
criteria.description: Did the learner say 'Ikanai to' instead of 'Ikimasen to'?

criteria.name: Noun Rule
criteria.description: Did the learner say 'Uso da to' instead of 'Uso to'?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: たかいと おもいます。たなかさんは いかないと おもいます。うそだと おもいます。

feedbackRules.onPass: Fantastic speaking! You perfectly juggled three different grammatical rules.
feedbackRules.onFail: Review the rules for nouns. You must add 'da' before 'to omoimasu' when using a noun like 'Uso' (lie).
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good try! Make sure you didn't say 'Ikimasen to omoimasu'. The verb must be in plain form: 'Ikanai'.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: どう おもいますか。たかいと おもいます。たなかさんは いかないと おもいます。うそだと おもいます。

hintText: To say 'will not go', change Ikimasen to Ikanai.
